transcript.text:
[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[I didn't say I will only eat 1]
Do people only eat this much?
Is it even enough?
[Who here sponsored Tzuyang?!]
1 pizza and a can of beer is a combo set
[Just eat]
[Pizza & Beer is the way to go]
[Can't forget about the other flavors]
[1 person=7 pies?!]
This is a little shocking
Hello everyone
I'm at Hongdae today
There's a fire pit pizza place here that is perfect for people that want to eat alone
It's a polar bear
Cute

I'm here because Go Pizza and Gom Pyo did a collaboration for a pop-up store
Polar bear!
Hi
[Go Pizza located in Sangsu]
Hello
[Welcome Tzuyang]
[Flowers?]
It has all of our sides: Cheese balls, chicken tenders, potato fries, etc
Thank you very much
You can order what you'd like to eat through the kiosk
Order here
Am I ordering too freely?
Look at the store It's so pretty
That's cute
His name is Pyo Gom
[There's a photo booth too]

It's a pizza box igloo
That's cool
The polar bear came to eat the pizza
[Can't forget about beers]
[Gom Pyo beers!]
Check this out
Amazing
Polar bear-shaped nuggets
[As she is enjoying her appetizer...]
[7 pies of pizza ready to go]
[Into the fire pit]
It's filled all the way
[Garlic sauce]
That's so good Real mozzarella
[Ready to be served]
[And today's highlight]

[Pyo Gom cheese]
Here's your order
Thank you
Is this the combo? Thank you
This is 1 serving each
It's a little bigger than my hand
Do people only eat this much?
Is this even enough?
It's about 3.5 slices of a regular pizza
This one is Pyo Gom Pizza
We tried to portray trails of snow a polar bear walked by
It's a delicious sweet & spicy combination between jalapeños and cream cheese
Enjoy your meal
[Satisfied]
-Really, enjoy your meal -Thank you
The combo comes with the pizza, nuggets, and the beer

Let's try the new item first then
It's a polar bear-shaped cheese on top
That's cute
Bon appetit
Yummy~!
Everything I eat is just so delicious
Really cute, right?
Look at that
The pizza itself is really delicious!
It's a spicy cream cheese Probably because of the jalapeño
It's something I've never had before It also has some garlic taste
I also love the taste of the fire oven
Really good!
This is fried rice paper on top
It's like crackers
I've never had anything like it It's really unique

Spicy garlic cream pizza?
I will have to enjoy this meal with some Gom Pyo beer
I've been wanting to try this beer since I saw it at the convenience store
That's tasty!
It has a sweet taste to it
Garlic dipping sauce
This sauce is a must
It's really good
This is perfect for 1 person
What next?
Too many to select from
The nuggets are polar bears
Cute~
Tasty
Pepperoni Mania Pizza
Plenty of pepperonis on top

I love the smell of these pizzas
The garlic dipping sauce is really good
I differentiate good and bad pizza shops from their dipping sauces
Let open all of them
This is Chili Pepper Mayo Sauce
Dip it in here
You can definitely taste the chili pepper
Yum
Sweet Potato next
Sweet potato cubicles and mousse
I think this goes with this
Right..?
Yes, this is honey Yummy!
Bread and honey tastes so good
Lots of mousse too
Dip it in

I can't relate... but There are people that can't finish 1 pie of pizza
This is perfect for someone that wants pizza alone
Also, this lets you try other toppings and flavors since you won't be stuck with 1 same pie of pizza
It's really different
This new item is really delicious
#1
This! Corn Drugs
I've never had anything like it
Maybe like a corn & cheese pizza?
Does this go with honey too?
Excuse me Which pizzas go with honey?
-It's the Pyo Gom Pizza -Oh, is that so?
It's not like the cheese pizza that I'm used to
This is really like a drug Although I've never done drugs...
There's this scent that is very addicting
This is tasty

This is just what I like
It's like a very sweet and tasty corn cheese plate on top of a pizza
That's really good
I warmed this up just now
And it tastes much better
Pizza needs to be eaten fresh out of the oven
So good
Next!
I really like bacon potato pizzas
It can't go wrong
The sauce drizzle makes it look so appetizing
It has potatoes and bacon
The potato melts down the saltiness from the bacon
We're currently hosting an event for those who order our new item
Pick 1 and we will give you the prize accordingly
What's the prize?

A variety of items like bags, notepad, toothpaste all from the brand Gom Pyo
-How about pizzas? -Yes, pizzas too
Is there a 'sorry, try again'?
Of course All bets have a loss
Number 1
It's been so long The last time I've done this was in elementary school
[Self drum roll]
What's number 7?
Shrimp rings or cheese balls
Amazing
I did well, right?
It's ranked #7 out of 10
Would you like to try again?
Hey, that's not fair
[Yes, go ahead!]
Okay, edit it out of the video

[Editor: I can't]
[Self drum roll]
Number 6
You won the notepad
Just 1 sec
This is a small notepad from Gom Pyo
That's cute!
Thank oyu
I would like the shrimp rings, please
You should try it too
What did you get?
Try again?
Again?
[This must be it]
What is it? It's something weird huh
Toothpaste!

Toothpaste
That was really fun
If you eat it deliciously, we will give you 1 more time
Really? Thank you
Those who order the new combo set can play that game
Bulgogi pizza looks yummy
Fresh from the fire pit
It's very sweet and salty
The smokiness is out of this world
That's really good
The cream and bulgogi toppings are incredible
This is Sriracha Shrimp
And other ingredients too
Shrimp, pineapples, shrimp, Wait, I said shrimp 2 times
The shrimp doesn't make the pizza fishy at all
The taste itself is very...

This is spicy
The tip of my tongue is on fire Perfect to relieve stress
This goes well with the garlic dipping sauce
Come here bears
Eat them together
Sorry!
Salty and tasty pepperoni
Sweet potato is very sweet
Good kind of sweet
This is my favorite Today's MVP
[Miserable crime scene]
This is a little shocking
How do you feel after eating 1 of these?
Women usually can't finish it all
Men can finish it but they will be full
[How so?]

This is tasty, but I'll have to finish it right now
I'm sorry but can I have 1 more Dr. Pepper?
[Speechless]
-Here's some more Dr. Pepper -Thank you
Last slice of the bacon potato pizza
[She must have a stomach just for drinks...]
Last sweet potato slice
Last slice of the new pizza
-Can I really do it again? -I'm a man of my word
My favorite number: 3!
Please!
Number 6
You got the notepad again
It really is the notepad...
-I'll bring you another one -Thank you
I had Go Pizza for today's mukbang

Everything was really delicious
And I think it's perfect for people that want to eat pizza by themselves [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
